name: change_mgmt
description: an IT change-management (CAB) approval world; actions request, approve, deploy, rollback

card.description: an IT change-management (CAB) approval world; actions request, approve, deploy, rollback

rules: 'request' opens a new change request (status -> requested) only when no change is in flight (idle, deployed, or rolled_back); it resets approvals to 0, records the change's risk, and assigns a new change_id.
'approve' records one CAB member's sign-off on a 'requested' change; when approvals reach required_approvals the change is promoted to 'approved'.
'deploy' is legal only for an 'approved' change: it sets status to 'deployed' and increments deployments. An unapproved change can never deploy.
'rollback' reverts a 'deployed' change to 'rolled_back' and increments rollbacks; a new request may then begin the cycle again.
